# API Checklist: Fall Back to Straight-Line Distance When Routing Fails

**Purpose**: Validate response fields and error codes for fallback.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/027-straight-line-fallback/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Response Fields

- [x] CHK-API-001 Response includes distance mode and fallback flags.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Response includes fallback reason and warnings.
- [x] CHK-API-003 Response includes correlation ID.

## Error Codes

- [x] CHK-API-004 Invalid coordinates return HTTP 422.
- [x] CHK-API-005 Disabled fallback returns HTTP 503.
